mapper.sql: scmi.group_id, scmi.employee_id, scmi.work_card, scmi.employee_name, scmi.operation_code, scmi.error_msg, scmi.data_status, scmi.consolation_money_type, scmi.application_date, scmi.application_money, scmi.relatives_died, scmi.released_money, scmi.released_flag, scmi.released_time, scmi.enabled_flag, scmi.id, scmi.create_time, scmi.create_by, scmi.update_time, scmi.update_by, scmi.date, scmi.child_name, scmi.remarks

${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.consolation_money_type as ${tAlias}_consolation_money_type, ${tAlias}.application_date as ${tAlias}_application_date, ${tAlias}.application_money as ${tAlias}_application_money, ${tAlias}.relatives_died as ${tAlias}_relatives_died, ${tAlias}.released_money as ${tAlias}_released_money, ${tAlias}.released_flag as ${tAlias}_released_flag, ${tAlias}.released_time as ${tAlias}_released_time, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.child_name as ${tAlias}_child_name, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks
mapper.insert: insert into swm_consolation_money_interface (group_id, employee_id, work_card, employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, released_money, released_flag, released_time, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, date, pay_start_date, pay_end_date, child_name, remarks ) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{consolationMoneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{applicationMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{relativesDied,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{releasedMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{releasedFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{releasedTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{payStartDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{payEndDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{childName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update swm_consolation_money_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, consolation_money_type = #{consolationMoneyType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, application_date = #{applicationDate,jdbcType=DATE}, application_money = #{applicationMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, relatives_died = #{relativesDied,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, released_money = #{releasedMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, released_flag = #{releasedFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, released_time = #{releasedTime,jdbcType=DATE}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, date = #{date, jdbcType=DATE}, child_name = #{childName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} remarks = #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into swm_consolation_money_interface( group_id, employee_id, work_card, employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, consolation_money_type, application_money, relatives_died, released_money, released_flag, released_time, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, date, child_name, remarks ) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1 ), -1), right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6), #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, 'C', case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1),-1) = -1 then '系统中没有该人员' else '' end , case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and pe.enabled_flag = 1), -1) = -1 then 'F' else 'T' end, #{consolationMoneyType, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{applicationMoney, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{relativesDied, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{releasedMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 1, #{releasedTime,jdbcType=DATE}, 1, getdate(), #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, getdate(), #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{childName, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{remarks, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

insert into swm_consolation_money_interface( group_id, employee_id, work_card, employee_name, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, consolation_money_type, application_date, application_money, relatives_died, released_money, released_flag, released_time, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, date, child_name ) select #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1),
right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6),
#{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR},
'U', case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then '当前慰问金数据中不存在该员工' else case when exists (select 1 from swm_consolation_money scm join pm_employee pe on pe.id = scm.employee_id and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and scm.consolation_money_type = #{consolationMoneyType, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),scm.application_date,110) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{applicationDate, jdbcType = DATE},110) and scm.application_money = #{applicationMoney, jdbcType = DECIMAL} ) then '' else '没找到对应的慰问金（需匹配申请日期、申请金额以及类别）' end end, case when isnull((select pe.id from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6)), -1) = -1 then 'F' else case when exists (select 1 from swm_consolation_money scm join pm_employee pe on pe.id = scm.employee_id and pe.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) as varchar),6) and scm.consolation_money_type = #{consolationMoneyType, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),scm.application_date,110) = CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), #{applicationDate, jdbcType = DATE},110) and scm.application_money = #{applicationMoney, jdbcType = DECIMAL} ) then 'T' else 'F' end end, #{consolationMoneyType, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{applicationDate, jdbcType = DATE}, #{applicationMoney, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{relativesDied, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{releasedMoney,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 1, #{releasedTime,jdbcType=DATE}, 1, getdate(), #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, getdate(), #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{childName}
